ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Scheduling Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Jonathan Neil & Associates Inc A
California Corporation,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Laxman Das Individually and DBA Quality Sports,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Reid Louie sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $35,699.46
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,414.05
Attorney's Fees: $3,625.00
Costs: $524.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $51,263.01

Judgment signed in open court.
